name: real-estate-hdr
description: Next-Gen luxury serverless HDR platform for real estate agents.

scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.deploy:frontend: gcloud run deploy hdr-frontend --source ./frontend --region us-central1 --project development-resources-488110 --allow-unauthenticated
scripts.deploy:backend: gcloud run deploy hdr-worker --source ./backend --region us-central1 --project development-resources-488110 --allow-unauthenticated
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:frontend
